form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation sixth of 8 at Cranbourne Vg Carat December 27 over 1200m, 4 len behind Steel Move with 56kg at $51. On debut second of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw December 12 over 1230m, 3.5 len behind Tower Bridge carrying 58kg at $5.50. Merit in both runs in the debut prep and impressed winning a trial ahead of the return.

form.formComment: Resuming after a lengthy spell. Only one run when got back early 5th of 9 at Mornington 3yo Mdn-Sw on September 18 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Sassy For Sure carrying 58kg at $11. SCRATCHED

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Last start ran last of 10 at Towong Mdn-Sw on March 7 over 1200m, slow going 10 len behind Hidden Bay carrying 55kg at $26. At only start last preparation ran last of 10 at Tatura 3yo Mdn-Sw on September 8 over 1100m, 19 len behind Educated with 58kg at $151. Not seeing any improvement this time.

form.formComment: Gelding by Star Witness facing the starter for the first time. Won a jump-out at Ballarat on March 12. Hasn't finished further back than second in four jumpouts, including a win at the latest, so looks poised for a big debut.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start second last of 9 at Canterbury 2yo Mdn-Sw on January 31 2025 over 1200m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Karinska with 57kg at $3.70. Returned from break 3rd of 11 at Albury Super Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1175m, slow going 0.8 len behind Borjnord carrying 58.5kg at $3.50. Fitter for the run in a Super Maiden at Albury and looks tough to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping shifted in and made contact with You Sexy Thing.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of four months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign seventh of 12 at Ballarat Cl3-Sw December 6 over 1400m, soft track; 2.25 len behind Shystar with 55.5kg at $31. First up last campaign third of 8 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw October 29 over 1000m, 2 len behind Cavern carrying 58kg at $31. Outclassed after a couple of handy placings last prep, so better suited here off some nice trials.

form.formComment: Was as a despised roughie at debut, 7th of 10 at Bendigo 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Outer Banks carrying 56kg at $91. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start ran last in a small field at Ballarat Synthetic 3yo Mdn-Sw on August 11 over 1000m, 9 len behind Odessa with 56kg at $12. Returned from break 3rd of 10 at Avoca Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1100m, 1.75 len behind Life After Love with 57kg at $31. Should run well again and is definitely in the mix.
